docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-05-2026 IN DEPT. 206, MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS OFF CALENDAR, AMENDED NOTICE OF MOTION WAS FILED ON 4/30/26 FOR THE CORRECT HEARING TIME. (D206)
ORDER ON MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-05-2026 IN 206, TERESA LI ESQ. APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF; CELINE PHAM ESQ. APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE OF 10-26-26 IS CONTINUED TO 1/25/27 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRE-TRIAL DEADLINES IS ACCORDING TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ROCHELLE EAST, CLERK: V WU, NOT REPORTED (D206)
